creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text: Ah, finally Vulkan support. Thank you for the quick patch. I can confirm that it's working. The Witcher 3 is running fine in wine + dxvk. A walked around a little bit, seems stable and no render glitches. Only that my old and trusty Geforce 7500TI is too slow for the game, it's stuttering with ~15 FPS. A screenshot is here: https://deponie.yamagi.org/temp/tw3fbsd.jpg
